nodes.label: tauriApi()
nodes.snippet: tauriApi = () => (window as unknown as { __TAURI__?: TauriApi }).__TAURI__

nodes.label: currentDesktopWindow()
nodes.snippet: currentDesktopWindow = () => tauriApi()?.window?.getCurrentWindow?.()

nodes.label: currentThemeWindow()
nodes.snippet: currentThemeWindow = () => tauriApi()?.webviewWindow?.getCurrentWebviewWindow?.()

nodes.label: Titlebar()
zoom()
nodes.snippet: zoom = () => platform.webviewZoom?.() ?? 1

nodes.label: titlebarZoom()
nodes.snippet: titlebarZoom = () => (windows() ? Math.max(zoom(), minTitlebarZoom) : zoom())

nodes.label: counterZoom()
nodes.snippet: counterZoom = () => (windows() && titlebarZoom() < 1 ? 1 / titlebarZoom() : 1)

nodes.label: minHeight()
windowsControlsWidth()
nodes.snippet: windowsControlsWidth = () => `${windowsControlsBaseWidth / Math.max(titlebarZoom(), 1)}px`

nodes.label: path()
nodes.snippet: path = () => `${location.pathname}${location.search}${location.hash}`

nodes.label: back()
forward()
getWin()
interactive()
drag()
maximize()
newSessionHref()
navigateTab()
matchRoute()
currentTab()
nodes.snippet: currentTab = () => matchRoute(layout.route())

nodes.label: openNewTab()
nodes.snippet: openNewTab = () => navigate(newSessionHref())

nodes.label: refreshTabsAreOverflowing()
divider()
nodes.snippet:
divider = () =>
                            i() !== 0 && (
                              <div class="w-[1.5px] h-3 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-[var(--v2-background-bg-layer-02)]" />
                            )

nodes.label: TitlebarV2Right()
TitlebarUpdateIconButton()
TabNavItem()
closeTab()
ProjectTabAvatar()
directory()
nodes.snippet: directory = () => props.directory

nodes.label: sessionId()
nodes.snippet: sessionId = () => props.sessionId

nodes.label: DraftTabItem()
closeTab()
NewSessionTabItem()
closeTab()
ChannelIndicator()
